economic_hypothesis.null: the frozen weekly real-time WEI 13-week growth state does not improve net weekly SPY/QQQ rotation over the frozen comparators
economic_hypothesis.alternative: a WEI level above its same-vintage 13-week mean identifies broad real-economy acceleration that supports QQQ growth exposure, while a level at or below that mean favors broad SPY
economic_hypothesis.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal uses the Dallas Fed weekly real-economy index level relative to its own same-vintage 13-week history and is distinct from closed price, flow, funding, settlement, ADS impulse and single-indicator macro lineages
economic_hypothesis.proxy_limitation: WEI is a model-based common component and is revised; exact ALFRED real-time vintage selection is mandatory, and the frozen four-week inference block is an outcome-blind design assumption rather than proof of sufficient dependence coverage

signal.source: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas WEI definition and official ALFRED WEI real-time vintages
signal.publication_time: Dallas Fed states that WEI is published Thursday at 11:30 America/New_York
signal.decision_time: 09:00 America/New_York on the first accepted XNYS session strictly after the Thursday snapshot cutoff
signal.latest_allowed_vintage: latest actual ALFRED vintage date no later than the conservative Thursday cutoff
signal.current_measure: latest non-null WEI observation dated before the selected actual vintage
signal.reference: arithmetic mean of the current measure and exactly the preceding 12 consecutive weekly observations from that same vintage
signal.target_rule: current WEI strictly above the same-vintage 13-week arithmetic mean selects QQQ at weight 1.0; otherwise selects SPY at weight 1.0
signal.missing_rule: missing or duplicate vintage or observation, nonconsecutive weekly dates, nonfinite value, future-vintage leakage, calendar mismatch or insufficient history invalidates the interval; no interpolation, current-vintage substitution, alternate source, threshold, window, smoothing, persistence, source blend or direction repair

execution.entry: the accepted XNYS open after the frozen 09:00 decision, which must strictly precede that open
execution.holding: until the following weekly accepted execution open
execution.decision_price_basis: previous accepted-session raw close, known before the 09:00 decision
execution.corporate_actions: accepted SPY and QQQ cash distributions and split identities are processed by the shared portfolio core

comparator.primary: weekly rebalanced 50/50 SPY/QQQ target notional under identical cost, whole-share, cash, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action rules
comparator.secondary: weekly rebalanced SPY-only under identical rules

validation_gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY-only
arithmetic mean paired active return versus the 50/50 comparator strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
holdout_gates: all four validation-form gates evaluated on the holdout
centered-null one-sided paired bootstrap p-value at most 0.05
uncentered type-7 5% bootstrap lower bound on mean active return strictly positive

inference.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over weekly active returns versus the 50/50 comparator
inference.limitation: the prospectively frozen four-week block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of statistical sufficiency

stop_rules.validation_failure: permanently close the lineage without holdout access
stop_rules.validation_pass: unlock exactly one retrospective holdout execution
stop_rules.forbidden: no tuning, rerun, threshold or window change, alternate source, source blending, new comparator, changed holding period or post-outcome repair
